p2_summary: P2-1: NotFoundException/ConflictException bodies use {kind:...} at 6 sites; global HttpExceptionFilter drops kind. Same defect class as TM-3 B-CYCLE-P2-1.
P2-2: No @@unique([applicant_user_id, listing_id]) on Application; distinct client idempotency keys can create duplicate Applications for same (account, listing).
p3_summary: P3-1: unsigned base64url cursor (vs TM-3 HMAC) — owner-scoped, no IDOR; defer to post-TM-3-merge hoist (NO CODE in this fixer).
P3-2: anonymous apply mints unverified-email pre-coach User; operator PII sign-off concern, anti-bot is the agreed control (NO CODE).
P3-3: updateOwnProfile/runApply trim names but not headline/bio/array fields — trim parity fix.
